# MPP-I Paper v1.0

Release date: 2026-06-28

## Assets

- `paper/mpp-i-paper-v1.0.pdf`
- `paper/mpp-i-paper-v1.0.tex`

## Citation

Use `CITATION.cff` until a DOI is available. A Zenodo DOI may be added after the public repository and release workflow are stable.
